name: spideriq
description: Agent skills for every SpiderIQ product (SpiderPublish, SpiderMail, SpiderGate, …).

interface.shortDescription: Author, publish, and deploy on SpiderIQ products
interface.longDescription: Install the SpiderIQ skill suite to give your agent procedural knowledge of every SpiderIQ product — SpiderPublish for multi-tenant websites and booking flows, SpiderMail to run a real inbox (or a fleet of them: send/reply/forward, templates, labels, warmup + deliverability), and SpiderGate for LLM routing. Trigger phrases as short as 'create a landing page', 'check my inbox and reply', or 'set up a contact form' load the right procedure.
defaultPrompt: Create a landing page on this SpiderPublish tenant and deploy it
Update the shared header across the whole site
Set up a contact form and embed it on the homepage
